requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (IEC 62471 via applicable SNI)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（经适用 SNI 采纳的 IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（經適用 SNI 採納的 IEC 62471）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires is assessed against IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into Risk Groups (Exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3) based primarily on the blue light hazard and other optical radiation hazards. Where the applicable SNI for a lighting product adopts the IEC 62471 / IEC 62778 method (assessment of blue light hazard of light sources and luminaires), the LSPro type-testing for SNI certification includes the relevant photobiological evaluation, and the risk group classification informs required markings or warnings for higher risk groups. The assessment must reflect the product as operated on the Indonesian 230 V, 50 Hz supply. Confirm whether photobiological safety is within the mandatory SNI scope for the specific product with the LSPro.
summary.zh: LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全依据 IEC 62471（灯及灯系统的光生物安全）评估，主要依据蓝光危害及其他光辐射危害将产品分为危险组别（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。当某照明产品的适用 SNI 采纳 IEC 62471 / IEC 62778（光源及灯具蓝光危害评估）方法时，SNI 认证的 LSPro 型式试验即包含相关光生物评估，危险组别分类决定较高危险组别所需的标识或警告。评估须反映产品在印度尼西亚 230 V、50 Hz 电源下的运行状态。请向 LSPro 核实该具体产品的光生物安全是否属强制性 SNI 范围。
summary.zht: LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全依據 IEC 62471（燈及燈系統的光生物安全）評估，主要依據藍光危害及其他光輻射危害將產品分為危險組別（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。當某照明產品的適用 SNI 採納 IEC 62471 / IEC 62778（光源及燈具藍光危害評估）方法時，SNI 認證的 LSPro 型式試驗即包含相關光生物評估，危險組別分類決定較高危險組別所需的標識或警告。評估須反映產品在印度尼西亞 230 V、50 Hz 電源下的運行狀態。請向 LSPro 核實該具體產品的光生物安全是否屬強制性 SNI 範圍。

standards_or_laws: Applicable SNI adopting IEC 62471 — photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification)
IEC 62778 method (as adopted) — assessment of blue light hazard of light sources and luminaires

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which adopts IEC 62471 and uses the same Risk Group classification (Exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3). For certain products such as LED lighting intended for children or specific applications, blue light hazard requirements may be mandatory under product-specific GB standards, but in general GB/T 20145 is a recommended (T) standard rather than a uniformly binding market-access gate. Chinese photobiological test reports are not directly accepted by the Indonesian LSPro scheme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全性），采纳 IEC 62471，采用相同的危险组别分类（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。对于某些产品（如面向儿童或特定应用的 LED 照明），蓝光危害要求可能依据产品专用 GB 标准为强制要求，但总体上 GB/T 20145 为推荐性（T）标准，而非统一约束的市场准入门槛。中国光生物检测报告不被印度尼西亚 LSPro 制度直接接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全性），採納 IEC 62471，採用相同的危險組別分類（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。對於某些產品（如面向兒童或特定應用的 LED 照明），藍光危害要求可能依據產品專用 GB 標準為強制要求，但總體上 GB/T 20145 為推薦性（T）標準，而非統一約束的市場准入門檻。中國光生物檢測報告不被印度尼西亞 LSPro 制度直接接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR, adopts IEC 62471)

gap.en: Both Indonesia and China assess blue light hazard via IEC 62471 / GB/T 20145 with identical Risk Group classification, so the technical basis is aligned. The gaps are procedural and scope-related: (1) where the applicable Indonesian SNI brings photobiological safety into the mandatory SNI scope, it is verified through LSPro type testing rather than via a voluntary report; (2) Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are generally not directly accepted, so re-evaluation at an Indonesian-recognised laboratory may be required; (3) products classified above the exempt/RG1 group may require specific warning markings; (4) testing must reflect 230 V, 50 Hz operation. Confirm with the LSPro whether photobiological safety is mandatory for the specific lamp/luminaire and what markings the assigned risk group triggers.
gap.zh: 印度尼西亚与中国均通过 IEC 62471 / GB/T 20145 评估蓝光危害，危险组别分类完全一致，故技术基础对齐。差距在于程序及范围：（1）当适用的印度尼西亚 SNI 将光生物安全纳入强制性 SNI 范围时，须通过 LSPro 型式试验核验，而非依据自愿报告；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 报告通常不被直接接受，故可能须在印度尼西亚认可实验室重新评估；（3）分类高于豁免/RG1 组别的产品可能须加注特定警告标识；（4）检测须反映 230 V、50 Hz 运行。请向 LSPro 核实该具体灯/灯具的光生物安全是否为强制要求，以及所分配危险组别触发何种标识。
gap.zht: 印度尼西亞與中國均通過 IEC 62471 / GB/T 20145 評估藍光危害，危險組別分類完全一致，故技術基礎對齊。差距在於程序及範圍：（1）當適用的印度尼西亞 SNI 將光生物安全納入強制性 SNI 範圍時，須通過 LSPro 型式試驗核驗，而非依據自願報告；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 報告通常不被直接接受，故可能須在印度尼西亞認可實驗室重新評估；（3）分類高於豁免/RG1 組別的產品可能須加註特定警告標識；（4）檢測須反映 230 V、50 Hz 運行。請向 LSPro 核實該具體燈/燈具的光生物安全是否為強制要求，以及所分配危險組別觸發何種標識。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / where in scope — photobiological safety (IEC 62471-based) verified through LSPro type testing where the applicable SNI brings it within the mandatory SNI scope for the product
mandatory_status.cn: Mostly recommended — GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (IEC 62471-based); mandatory only where a product-specific GB standard requires it

source.publisher: Badan Standardisasi Nasional (BSN) — National Standardisation Agency of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Blue light hazard is assessed via IEC 62471 in both Indonesia and China, with identical Risk Group classification. Where the applicable Indonesian SNI brings photobiological safety within the mandatory SNI scope, it is verified through LSPro type testing, and Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are generally not directly accepted. Products above the exempt/RG1 group may require warning markings. Confirm mandatory scope and required markings with the LSPro, and ensure testing reflects 230 V, 50 Hz operation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚与中国均通过 IEC 62471 评估蓝光危害，危险组别分类完全一致。当适用的印度尼西亚 SNI 将光生物安全纳入强制性 SNI 范围时，须通过 LSPro 型式试验核验，且中国 GB/T 20145 报告通常不被直接接受。高于豁免/RG1 组别的产品可能须加注警告标识。请向 LSPro 核实强制范围及所需标识，并确保检测反映 230 V、50 Hz 运行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞與中國均通過 IEC 62471 評估藍光危害，危險組別分類完全一致。當適用的印度尼西亞 SNI 將光生物安全納入強制性 SNI 範圍時，須通過 LSPro 型式試驗核驗，且中國 GB/T 20145 報告通常不被直接接受。高於豁免/RG1 組別的產品可能須加註警告標識。請向 LSPro 核實強制範圍及所需標識，並確保檢測反映 230 V、50 Hz 運行。

requirement_topic.en: Risk Group Marking, Warnings, and Product/Packaging Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 危险组别标识、警告及产品/包装标签
requirement_topic.zht: 危險組別標識、警告及產品/包裝標籤

summary.en: Where an LED product is classified above the exempt risk group under the IEC 62471-based assessment, the applicable SNI and luminaire safety standard (SNI IEC 60598 series) require corresponding markings and instructions — for example a do-not-stare warning for RG2 sources, or restrictions on intended use. In addition, certified products must carry the SNI mark (tanda SNI) together with the certification number on the product and/or packaging, and labelling/instructions for the Indonesian market are expected to be available in Bahasa Indonesia. ESDM energy labelling (label hemat energi) on packaging is required separately for in-scope self-ballasted lamps. The combination of SNI mark, any risk-group warnings, and the ESDM label must appear correctly before the product is sold.
summary.zh: 当某 LED 产品在基于 IEC 62471 的评估中被分类高于豁免危险组别时，适用 SNI 及灯具安全标准（SNI IEC 60598 系列）要求相应的标识及说明——例如对 RG2 光源加注请勿凝视警告，或对预期用途加以限制。此外，认证产品须在产品和/或包装上标注 SNI 标志（tanda SNI）连同认证编号，且面向印度尼西亚市场的标签/说明应以印度尼西亚语（Bahasa Indonesia）提供。适用范围内的自镇流灯须在包装上单独标注 ESDM 能效标签（label hemat energi）。SNI 标志、任何危险组别警告及 ESDM 标签的组合须在产品销售前正确呈现。
summary.zht: 當某 LED 產品在基於 IEC 62471 的評估中被分類高於豁免危險組別時，適用 SNI 及燈具安全標準（SNI IEC 60598 系列）要求相應的標識及說明——例如對 RG2 光源加註請勿凝視警告，或對預期用途加以限制。此外，認證產品須在產品和/或包裝上標註 SNI 標誌（tanda SNI）連同認證編號，且面向印度尼西亞市場的標籤/說明應以印度尼西亞語（Bahasa Indonesia）提供。適用範圍內的自鎮流燈須在包裝上單獨標註 ESDM 能效標籤（label hemat energi）。SNI 標誌、任何危險組別警告及 ESDM 標籤的組合須在產品銷售前正確呈現。

standards_or_laws: SNI IEC 60598 series — luminaire marking and instruction requirements
SNI mark (tanda SNI) marking rules — Kemenperin / BSN; Bahasa Indonesia labelling expectation

summary.en: In China, photobiological risk-group warnings follow GB/T 20145 / GB 7000 series marking requirements, and luminaire markings follow GB 7000.1 (the GB adoption of IEC 60598-1). Products in the CCC scope carry the CCC mark with the certificate number. Chinese-market labelling and instructions are in Chinese. There is no Bahasa Indonesia labelling requirement and no SNI mark in the Chinese scheme; the CCC mark is China-specific and not interchangeable with the SNI mark.
summary.zh: 在中国，光生物危险组别警告遵循 GB/T 20145 / GB 7000 系列标识要求，灯具标识遵循 GB 7000.1（IEC 60598-1 的 GB 采纳版）。属 CCC 范围的产品标注 CCC 标志连同证书编号。中国市场的标签及说明为中文。中国制度无印度尼西亚语标签要求，也无 SNI 标志；CCC 标志为中国特有，与 SNI 标志不可互换。
summary.zht: 在中國，光生物危險組別警告遵循 GB/T 20145 / GB 7000 系列標識要求，燈具標識遵循 GB 7000.1（IEC 60598-1 的 GB 採納版）。屬 CCC 範圍的產品標註 CCC 標誌連同證書編號。中國市場的標籤及說明為中文。中國制度無印度尼西亞語標籤要求，也無 SNI 標誌；CCC 標誌為中國特有，與 SNI 標誌不可互換。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 — Luminaires Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR, adopts IEC 60598-1)
GB/T 20145-2006 / GB 7000 series — photobiological warning and luminaire marking (China)

gap.en: The risk-group warning logic (e.g., RG2 do-not-stare) is technically similar in both markets, but the market-access marking and language differ entirely. For Indonesia, certified products must bear the SNI mark (tanda SNI) and certification number — the CN CCC mark is not interchangeable and carries no validity in Indonesia. Labelling and user instructions are expected in Bahasa Indonesia, whereas CN products use Chinese. In-scope self-ballasted lamps must additionally carry the ESDM label hemat energi on packaging. Chinese manufacturers must redesign packaging artwork for the Indonesian market to include the SNI mark, certification number, any required risk-group warnings, and the ESDM label, all in the correct language and format. Confirm exact marking placement and language requirements with the LSPro.
gap.zh: 危险组别警告逻辑（如 RG2 请勿凝视）在两个市场技术上相近，但市场准入标识及语言完全不同。在印度尼西亚，认证产品须标注 SNI 标志（tanda SNI）及认证编号——中国 CCC 标志不可互换，在印度尼西亚不具效力。标签及用户说明应以印度尼西亚语提供，而中国产品使用中文。适用范围内的自镇流灯还须在包装上标注 ESDM label hemat energi。中国制造商须为印度尼西亚市场重新设计包装图文，纳入 SNI 标志、认证编号、任何所需危险组别警告及 ESDM 标签，且均采用正确的语言和格式。请向 LSPro 核实确切的标识位置及语言要求。
gap.zht: 危險組別警告邏輯（如 RG2 請勿凝視）在兩個市場技術上相近，但市場准入標識及語言完全不同。在印度尼西亞，認證產品須標註 SNI 標誌（tanda SNI）及認證編號——中國 CCC 標誌不可互換，在印度尼西亞不具效力。標籤及用戶說明應以印度尼西亞語提供，而中國產品使用中文。適用範圍內的自鎮流燈還須在包裝上標註 ESDM label hemat energi。中國製造商須為印度尼西亞市場重新設計包裝圖文，納入 SNI 標誌、認證編號、任何所需危險組別警告及 ESDM 標籤，且均採用正確的語言和格式。請向 LSPro 核實確切的標識位置及語言要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SNI mark (tanda SNI) plus certification number required on certified products; risk-group warnings per applicable SNI; ESDM label for in-scope lamps; Bahasa Indonesia labelling expected
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC mark plus certificate number for in-scope luminaires; GB 7000 / GB/T 20145 warning markings; Chinese-language labelling

source.publisher: Badan Standardisasi Nasional (BSN) — SNI mark (tanda SNI) information, Republic of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesian certified LED products must bear the SNI mark (tanda SNI) and certification number, carry any risk-group warnings required by the applicable SNI, and (for in-scope lamps) the ESDM label — with Bahasa Indonesia labelling expected. The Chinese CCC mark and Chinese-language labelling do not satisfy these requirements. Packaging artwork must be redesigned for Indonesia; confirm exact marking, language, and placement rules with the LSPro before printing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚认证 LED 产品须标注 SNI 标志（tanda SNI）及认证编号，加注适用 SNI 所要求的任何危险组别警告，并（对适用范围内的灯）标注 ESDM 标签——且应以印度尼西亚语标签。中国 CCC 标志及中文标签不能满足上述要求。包装图文须为印度尼西亚重新设计；印制前请向 LSPro 核实确切的标识、语言及位置规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞認證 LED 產品須標註 SNI 標誌（tanda SNI）及認證編號，加註適用 SNI 所要求的任何危險組別警告，並（對適用範圍內的燈）標註 ESDM 標籤——且應以印度尼西亞語標籤。中國 CCC 標誌及中文標籤不能滿足上述要求。包裝圖文須為印度尼西亞重新設計；印製前請向 LSPro 核實確切的標識、語言及位置規則。
